..purpose: AskAlfred modular monolith: building-aware structured and semantic search.

auth.purpose: Authentication, authorisation, access contexts, and credential handling.

building.purpose: Canonical building identity, aliases, normalisation, and resolution.

config.purpose: Environment-backed settings, constants, routing, and feature flags.

core.purpose: Shared runtime clients, sessions, telemetry, locks, readiness, and outcomes.

fra.purpose: Fire Risk Assessment parsing, enrichment, triage, and supersession.

ingest.purpose: Secure document discovery, extraction, vectorisation, and transactional ingestion.

interfaces.purpose: Infrastructure ports and their current adapters.

ops.purpose: Monitoring, alerting, and operational deployment configuration.

plan.purpose: Design decisions, delivery plans, and outstanding work.

query_core.purpose: Query context, preprocessing, intent routing, execution, and conversation lifecycle.

query_preprocessors.purpose: Building and business-term extraction, spell checking, and complexity analysis.

scripts.purpose: Supported maintenance and security command implementations.

search_core.purpose: Structured and semantic retrieval, ranking, deduplication, and answer generation.

security.purpose: Input, file, CSV, context, and log safety plus rate limiting.

tests.purpose: Automated pytest regression and acceptance suite.

tools.purpose: Developer utilities, diagnostics, analysis, and project-map generation.

ui.purpose: Streamlit presentation components and shared UI constants.

main.py.purpose: Streamlit application entry point and composition root.

ARCHITECTURE.md.purpose: Canonical architectural overview, flows, boundaries, and design decisions.

README.md.purpose: Developer and operator introduction, setup, usage, and package overview.

project-map.yaml.purpose: Generated file, directory, Python-symbol, import, test, and entry-point index.

project-map-overrides.json.purpose: Human-maintained architectural metadata merged into the generated project map.
